parameters.name: AuthConf
parameters.description: Authentication information for the origin of a CNAME record.

parameters.name: BizName
parameters.description:
The business scenario for acceleration. This parameter is not required for records that do not enable acceleration. Valid values:
- **video_image**: Video and image.
- **api**: API.
- **web**: Web page.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.description: DNS information of the record. The content required for this field varies depending on the record type. For details, refer to the <props="china">[documentation](~~2708761~~)</props><props="intl">[documentation](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/2708761.html)</props>.

parameters.name: HostPolicy
parameters.description:
The origin fetch HOST policy, which takes effect only for CNAME records. It defines the policy for including the HOST header during origin fetch. Two modes are supported:
- **follow_hostname**: Follow the host record.
- **follow_origin_domain**: Follow the origin domain name.

parameters.name: Proxied
parameters.description:
Specifies whether proxy acceleration is enabled for the record. Only CNAME and A/AAAA records support proxy acceleration. Valid values:  
- **true**: Enables proxy.  
- **false**: Disables proxy acceleration.

parameters.name: RecordId
parameters.description: The ID of the record, which can be obtained by calling [ListRecords](~~2850265~~).

parameters.name: SourceType
parameters.description:
Origin type for CNAME records. This parameter is required when adding a CNAME record. Valid values:  

- **OSS**: OSS origin.  
- **S3**: S3 origin.  
- **LB**: Server Load Balancer origin.  
- **OP**: Address pool origin.  
- **Domain**: Standard domain name origin.  

If this parameter is not specified or left empty, it defaults to Domain, indicating a standard domain name origin.

parameters.name: Ttl
parameters.description: The time-to-live (TTL) of the record, in seconds. The valid range is **30–86400**, or 1. When set to 1, the TTL is automatically determined.
